title: Career/Technical Education Teachers, Postsecondary
description: Teach vocational courses intended to provide occupational training below the baccalaureate level in subjects such as construction, mechanics/repair, manufacturing, transportation, or cosmetology, primarily to students who have graduated from or left high school. Teaching takes place in public or private schools whose primary business is academic or vocational education.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate students' work to determine progress, provide feedback, and make suggestions for improvement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Present lectures and conduct discussions to increase students' knowledge and competence using visual aids, such as graphs, charts, videotapes, and slides.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise and monitor students' use of tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer oral, written, or performance tests to measure progress and to evaluate training effectiveness.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide individualized instruction and tutorial or remedial instruction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports and maintain records, such as student grades, attendance rolls, and training activity details.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop curricula and plan course content and methods of instruction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine training needs of students or workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise independent or group projects, field placements, laboratory work, or other training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Integrate academic and vocational curricula so that students can obtain a variety of skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and assemble books, materials, supplies, and equipment for training, courses, or projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct on-the-job training classes or training sessions to teach and demonstrate principles, techniques, procedures, or methods of designated subjects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Acquire, maintain, and repair laboratory equipment and tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare outlines of instructional programs and training schedules and establish course goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise students on course selection, career decisions, and other academic and vocational concerns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in conferences, seminars, and training sessions to keep abreast of developments in the field, and integrate relevant information into training programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop teaching aids, such as instructional software, multimedia visual aids, or study materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Serve on faculty and school committees concerned with budgeting, curriculum revision, and course and diploma requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for lectures by experts in designated fields.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review enrollment applications and correspond with applicants to obtain additional information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
